description: 5 UX improvements: overdue badges, ghost risk icon, owner filter, inline table editing, bulk actions bar

userStories.title: Overdue badge on DealCard
userStories.description: As a rep, I want to see which deals are past their close date so I can prioritise follow-ups
acceptanceCriteria: Red 'Overdue' badge on DealCard when close_date < today OR expected_close_date < today
Badge in tags area alongside freshness/dormant badges
No badge when no close date set

userStories.title: Overdue column in PipelineTable
userStories.description: As a rep, I want to see days overdue in table view so I can sort by urgency
acceptanceCriteria: New 'Overdue' column showing days past close date
Dash when not overdue or no close date

userStories.title: Ghost risk icon on DealCard
userStories.description: As a rep, I want to see ghost risk at a glance so I can re-engage before losing the deal
acceptanceCriteria: Lucide Ghost icon on DealCard when ghost_probability > 70
userStories.notes: File: src/components/Pipeline/DealCard.tsx — use Lucide Ghost icon

userStories.title: Owner filter popover in PipelineHeader
userStories.description: As a manager, I want to filter pipeline by deal owner so I can review individual rep pipelines
acceptanceCriteria: Owner filter button enabled (remove disabled styling)
Popover with checkable list of org members

userStories.title: Inline edit — probability in PipelineTable
userStories.description: As a rep, I want to click a probability cell and edit inline so I don't need to open the deal sheet
acceptanceCriteria: Click probability cell enters edit mode with number input (0-100)
Optimistic update with rollback on error

userStories.title: Inline edit — close date in PipelineTable
userStories.description: As a rep, I want to click a close date cell and pick a new date inline
acceptanceCriteria: Click close date cell enters edit mode with date input
Optimistic update with rollback on error

userStories.title: BulkActionBar — stage change
userStories.description: As a rep, I want to select multiple deals and move them to a different stage in one action
acceptanceCriteria: Floating bar at bottom when 1+ deals selected
'Move to Stage' dropdown lists all pipeline stages
Single DB call updates all selected deals

userStories.title: BulkActionBar — close as lost
userStories.description: As a rep, I want to bulk-close stale deals as lost to clean up my pipeline
acceptanceCriteria: Updates status to lost and moves to Lost stage

userStories.title: BulkActionBar — assign owner
userStories.description: As a manager, I want to reassign multiple deals to a different rep
acceptanceCriteria: Single DB call updates owner_id on all selected
